message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam ParticipantPadding 25
skinparam BoxPadding 10

actor "laboratory coordinator" as LC
participant ":LabCoordinatorUI" as UI
participant ":ValidateTestReportController" as C
participant ":Company" as Company
participant "rp : TestStore" as TestStore
participant "rp : Test" as Test
participant "rp : TestReportStore" as TRStore
participant "rp : TestReport" as TR
participant ":TestDiagnosis" as TD

LC -> UI : 1 asks to validate report and diagnosis
activate UI

UI -> C : 2 createTestList()
activate C

C -> Company : 3 get = testReportsToValidate()
activate Company

Company -> TestStore : 4 get = testReportsToValidate()
activate TestStore

TestStore -> Test : 5 get = getTestList()
activate Test

TestStore -> TRStore : 6 get = testReportsToValidate()
activate TRStore

TRStore -> TR : 7 get = getTestReportList()
activate TR

TR -> TD : 8 get = getTestDiagnosis()
activate TD
deactivate TD
deactivate TR
deactivate TRStore
deactivate Test
deactivate TestStore
deactivate Company

ref over C
US15_SD_testReportsDTO.puml
end ref

C --> UI : 9
deactivate C

UI --> LC : 10 shows the available test reports and diagnosis and requests selection
LC -> UI : 11 chooses all tests
UI --> LC : 12 asks for confirmation
LC -> UI : 13 confirms selection

UI -> C : 14 validateAllTestReport()
activate C

loop
C -> TestStore : 15 validateTestReport(testId);
activate TestStore
TestStore -> Test : 16 setState(VALIDATED);
TestStore -> TRStore : 17 registerValidationDate(date);
TRStore -> TR : 18 setValidationDate(date);
deactivate TestStore
end

C --> LC : 19 informs operation success
deactivate C
deactivate UI

@enduml
```
